description: ol-unknown-type (issue #112): a worded `is a <type-word>` predicate whose literal type word (spec/execution-model.md:161-166) names no built-in Core type and no declared struct raises ol-unknown-type at the type word's span, with params { name } and stage semantic (spec/error-model.md). The type position is `is a`'s literal word, never a callable position (that is ol-unknown-command).
